intel_overview.headline_zh: UPC机制深化与AI工具重塑欧洲IP格局
intel_overview.headline_en: UPC Matures, AI Reshapes European IP Landscape
intel_overview.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧洲IP生态呈现司法机制成熟化与数字化工具普及化双重趋势。统一专利法院（UPC）通过PMAC调解系统及年度报告巩固其作为核心争议解决平台的地位，米兰分院在举证责任上的判例进一步明晰诉讼规则。同时，EPO加速推进无纸化及AI审查辅助，DeepIP等AI工具进入德国市场预示撰写环节变革。EUIPO则聚焦IP金融化与外观设计改革，英国强化知识资产管理指引。整体态势显示，欧洲正从单纯的权利保护转向IP资产的高效运营与合规管理。
top_signals: UPC启动PMAC调解服务并上线案件管理系统，替代性争议解决机制正式落地
EPO指南修订拟强制指明修改依据，并计划引用UPC上诉法院判例
DeepIP收购PatentMaker，AI辅助专利申请工具正式切入德国主流市场
EUIPO与EIF合作解锁IP支持型融资，推动知识产权资产金融化
cross_currents: 司法与行政协同增强：EPO审查指南拟纳入UPC判例，表明欧洲专利体系正从分散走向实质性的司法-行政标准统一
技术驱动效率与合规并重：AI既被EPO用于提升审查质量，也被律所用于抢占市场，同时UKIPO推出KAM枢纽应对数字化资产管理挑战
权利边界精细化界定：从巴黎法院维持商标显著性到欧盟法院限定养老院转播版权义务，司法实践正精准平衡权利人利益与公共利益
implications: 中国企业需重新评估在欧诉讼策略，充分利用UPC的PMAC调解机制降低维权或应诉成本
面对AI辅助申请工具的普及，企业应升级内部专利撰写与审核流程，以应对EPO更严格的修改依据要求
关注EUIPO推出的IP融资渠道及塞浦路斯IP盒制度，优化在欧洲的知识产权资产布局与税务筹划
watchlist: 2026年7月1日生效的欧盟外观设计改革第二阶段具体实施效果
EPO 2027年指南中关于强制指明修改依据及引用UPC判例的最终条款
UPC上诉法院后续判例对EPO审查实践的实际影响程度

daily_report.headline_zh: UPC强化侵权裁决，EUIPO发布设计改革指南
daily_report.headline_en: UPC Milan Sets Evidence Standards as EUIPO Issues Design Reform Guidance
daily_report.executive_line: UPC米兰分院确立专利举证新标准并裁定侵权，EUIPO发布外观设计改革第二阶段指南，UKIPO推出知识资产管理枢纽，欧洲IP执法与合规基础设施同步升级。
daily_report.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP领域呈现司法与行政双轨并进态势。统一专利法院（UPC）米兰分院在两起轮胎专利案中裁定侵权成立，并明确专利文献作为公知常识的例外情形及举证责任转移规则，强化了权利人保护。EUIPO发布欧盟外观设计改革第二阶段实施指南，为7月生效的新规提供操作指引。英国知识产权局推出知识资产管理枢纽，旨在提升研究机构IP商业化能力。此外，DeepIP收购德国PatentMaker，显示AI工具在欧洲专利市场的整合加速。

report_items.title_en: UKIPO Launches Knowledge Asset Management Hub for IP Guidance
report_items.title: Guidance: Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布“知识资产管理（KAM）枢纽”资源合集。该资源旨在协助研究机构和企业识别、保护、管理及利用其知识产权及更广泛的知识资产，提供相关指导与支持。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published the Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub, a centralized resource collection designed to assist research institutions and businesses. This guidance aims to support organizations in identifying, protecting, managing, and utilizing their intellectual property alongside wider knowledge assets. The hub serves as a practical tool for rights holders seeking structured approaches to asset oversight. It provides foundational information for entities looking to enhance their internal capabilities regarding IP recognition and stewardship. The publication...
core_points_zh: UKIPO推出KAM枢纽，作为帮助机构管理知识资产的资源合集
资源目标涵盖知识产权的识别、保护、管理及使用全流程
core_points_en: UKIPO releases KAM Hub to help identify and protect intellectual property assets.
Resource targets research institutions and businesses managing wider knowledge assets.
report_items.insight_zh: 此为政策性指导资源发布，非法律变更或判例。实务中可关注该枢纽提供的具体工具与框架，以优化内部IP管理流程，但需结合具体业务场景评估适用性。
report_items.insight_en: This publication offers a non-binding administrative resource rather than new legal precedent. For in-house counsel and IP teams, the hub may serve as a reference for structuring internal audits of intangible assets. It highlights the UKIPO's focus on broader knowledge asset management beyond traditional IP rights. Practitioners should review the specific tools provided to determine if they align with existing corpor...
insight_points_zh: 关注KAM枢纽提供的具体管理工具与最佳实践框架
观察该指南对研究机构与企业IP合规管理的实际辅助作用
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Provides a centralized reference for organizations aiming to improve internal identification and protection of intellectual property and knowledge assets.
Practice note: Useful for benchmarking current asset management processes against UKIPO-endorsed frameworks for research institutions and commercial entities.
What to monitor: Updates to the KAM Hub content and any subsequent detailed guides or tools released by the UKIPO for practical implementation.

report_items.title_zh: 巴黎法院认定HYDRAFACIAL商标未退化并具显著性
report_items.title_en: Paris Court Rejects Degeneracy of HYDRAFACIAL Mark, Affirms Distinctiveness and Sanctions Unauthorized Use
report_items.title: Le Tribunal judiciaire de Paris écarte la dégénérescence de la marque HYDRAFACIAL, reconnait son caractère distinctif per se et sanctionne son exploitation non autorisée
report_items.summary_zh: 巴黎司法法院于2025年4月2日作出终审判决（案号RG n°21/13260），裁定HYDRAFACIAL商标未发生退化，确认其本身具有显著性，并制裁了未经授权的使用行为。该判决解决了商标持有人与另一方之间的争议，明确了该品牌在法国的法律保护状态。
report_items.summary_en: The Paris Judicial Court issued a final judgment on April 2, 2025 (RG n°21/13260), resolving a dispute concerning the validity and protection of the HYDRAFACIAL trademarks. The court rejected claims that the mark had become generic, affirming its inherent distinctiveness. Consequently, the tribunal sanctioned the unauthorized exploitation of the brand by the opposing party. This decision confirms the legal standing of the HYDRAFACIAL marks in France, upholding the rights holder’s ability to enforce against third-party use. The ruling underscores the court’s assessment that the mark retains its...
core_points_zh: 巴黎司法法院驳回HYDRAFACIAL商标退化的主张，维持其有效性
法院确认该商标本身具有显著性，受法律保护
法院对未经授权使用该商标的行为进行了制裁
core_points_en: Paris Judicial Court rejects degeneracy claim, confirming HYDRAFACIAL trademark remains valid and distinctive.
Court affirms inherent distinctiveness of the mark, recognizing its per se protective status under French law.
Unauthorized exploitation of the HYDRAFACIAL brand was sanctioned, reinforcing enforcement against infringing third parties.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment illustrates the French judiciary’s rigorous approach to trademark degeneracy, requiring substantial proof of genericide before stripping protection. For rights holders, it highlights the importance of consistent enforcement to maintain distinctiveness. Practitioners should note the court’s willingness to uphold well-known marks against dilution arguments when active policing is demonstrated. Monitoring...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Reinforces value of proactive enforcement to prevent trademark degeneracy claims in competitive markets.
Practice note: French courts maintain high evidentiary standards for proving a mark has become a common name.
What to monitor: Future applications of this precedent in other technical or medical device trademark disputes.

report_items.title_zh: 米兰地院裁定专利文献构成公知常识及举证责任转移
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division on Patent Literature as Common General Knowledge and Evidentiary Asymmetry
report_items.title: Milan Local Division on patent literature as common general knowledge and evidentiary asymmetry
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院在倍耐力诉四川远星橡胶案中明确：仅在例外情况下，系列专利文献可构成本领域技术人员公知常识。若原告提供强有力侵权初步证据，而被告掌控关键技术信息，基于证据接近原则，举证责任可重新分配。法院援引EPO上诉委员会判例及欧盟法院Kelly案判决支持上述观点。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Milan Local Division clarified when patent literature constitutes common general knowledge and how evidentiary burdens shift in infringement proceedings. In Pirelli v Sichuan Yuanxing, the Court aligned with EPO case law, ruling that patent documents only exceptionally qualify as common general knowledge, such as when a coherent series demonstrates a generally known technique. The Court also addressed evidentiary asymmetry, confirming that proof burdens may redistribute where claimants provide strong indicia of infringement and defendants control relevant technical information. This de...
core_points_zh: 法院确认仅例外情况下专利文献可视为公知常识，如系列文件呈现连贯技术图景
若原告提供强有力侵权迹象且被告掌控关键信息，举证责任可重新分配
法院援引EPO判例及欧盟法院Kelly案，强调信息不对称下的证据效力保护
core_points_en: Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical series.
Evidentiary burdens may shift when claimants show strong infringement indicia and defendants control key information.
The principle of proximity of evidence supports redistributing proof obligations in cases of informational asymmetry.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment provides critical guidance for UPC litigation strategy regarding proof standards. It reinforces the high threshold for treating patent citations as common general knowledge while offering a procedural mechanism for rights holders facing evidentiary barriers. Practitioners should note the Court’s willingness to adjust burden-sharing based on evidence proximity, balancing initial proof requirements agains...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical information.
Practice note: Establishing patent literature as common general knowledge requires demonstrating a coherent series of documents, not isolated citations.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the threshold for strong indicia of infringement triggering evidentiary redistribution.

report_items.summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has published additional details regarding the implementation of Phase 2 of its design reform programme. These changes are scheduled to enter into force on 1 July 2026. The newly released guidance aims to provide clarity for registered design applicants and legal practitioners ahead of the imminent regulatory updates. This announcement serves as a preparatory resource for stakeholders managing EU design portfolios, offering early insight into procedural adjustments. By issuing this information well in advance of the effective date, the EU...
core_points_zh: EUIPO发布了欧盟外观设计改革第二阶段实施的进一步细节与指南
该改革计划的第二阶段定于2026年7月1日正式生效
新指南旨在为注册外观设计申请人及从业者提供前期指导
core_points_en: EUIPO published further implementation details for Phase 2 of the EU design reform programme.

report_items.title_zh: 通过塞浦路斯知识产权盒制度最大化软件与创新价值
report_items.title_en: Cyprus IP Box Regime: Tax Efficiency for Software and Innovation Assets
report_items.title: Maximising Software And Innovation Value Through The Cyprus IP Box Regime
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析塞浦路斯符合经合组织标准的知识产权盒制度。该制度允许对合格知识产权收入享受80%扣除，有效税率约3%。采用“修正关联法”，要求税收优惠与实际研发支出挂钩。受版权保护的软件明确纳入合格资产，但商标等品牌资产 excluded。合格收入涵盖许可费、嵌入产品的收入及处置收益。
report_items.summary_en: Cyprus offers an OECD-compliant Intellectual Property Box regime designed to incentivize research and development. The framework provides an eighty percent deduction on qualifying IP profits, resulting in an effective corporate tax rate of approximately three percent. This benefit applies to income derived from copyrighted software, algorithms, and platforms, provided the taxpayer demonstrates a direct link between the income and actual R&D expenditures. The regime utilizes a modified nexus approach to ensure compliance with international standards, requiring that tax relief remains proportion...
core_points_zh: 塞浦路斯知识产权盒提供80%利润扣除，结合15%企业税率，使合格IP收入有效税率降至约…
制度核心为修正关联法，确保税收减免比例与企业实际发生的合格研发支出相匹配，符合经合组织…
受版权保护的软件、算法及平台属于合格知识产权，但商标和徽标等品牌相关资产不符合该制度资格
core_points_en: Qualifying IP income benefits from an eighty percent deduction, yielding an effective tax rate near three percent.
The modified nexus approach links tax relief directly to substantiated research and development expenditures incurred by the entity.
Copyrighted software and digital assets qualify for the regime, whereas brand-related assets such as trademarks are excluded.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，塞浦路斯后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This regime is relevant for technology companies structuring IP ownership within the EU. It emphasizes substance over form, requiring robust documentation of R&D spend to justify tax benefits. Rights holders should assess whether their software development activities meet the modified nexus criteria to optimize fiscal efficiency while maintaining OECD compliance.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Tech firms holding copyrighted software can significantly reduce tax liability on IP-derived income through structured R&D investment.
Practice note: Accurate allocation and documentation of qualifying R&D expenditures are essential to satisfy the modified nexus approach requirements.
What to monitor: Watch for evolving administrative guidance on eligible R&D costs and potential updates to OECD nexus standards affecting eligibility.

report_items.title_zh: EPO决定T 0655/24：平衡抗体权利要求的结构与功能特征
report_items.title_en: EPO Decision T 0655/24: Balancing Structure and Function in Antibody Claims
report_items.title: EPO decision T 0655/24: Striking the Right Balance in Antibody Claim Drafting
report_items.summary_zh: 本文分析EPO决定T 0655/24，探讨如何在抗体权利要求中平衡结构与功能特征以确立创造性。针对仅由部分结构特征定义的权利要求易受质疑的问题，该决定展示了一种替代方案：结合有限的结构定义（如特定Fc突变）与反映技术效果的功能限制，既确保技术效果在权利要求范围内可信，又避免保护范围过窄。
report_items.summary_en: This analysis of EPO decision T 0655/24 addresses the challenge of drafting antibody claims that satisfy inventive step requirements without becoming unduly narrow. The European Patent Office requires technical effects to be credible across the entire claim scope. While defining antibodies by full variable domain sequences ensures credibility, it often restricts protection. T 0655/24 illustrates an alternative approach combining limited structural definitions, such as specific Fc mutations, with functional limitations. This method maintains claim breadth while ensuring the asserted technical e...
core_points_zh: EPO实践中，若技术效果无法在权利要求全范围内被证实可信，则不能支持创造性
T 0655/24展示了结合特定Fc突变结构定义与功能性限制的权利要求撰写方法
该方法要求Fc区不结合Fcγ受体，且血浆清除率偏差控制在特定比例内
core_points_en: Technical effects must be credible across the full claim scope to support inventive step at the EPO.
T 0655/24 combines specific Fc mutation structures with functional limits to balance breadth and credibility.
Functional parameters included non-binding of Fc gamma receptors and controlled plasma clearance rate deviations.
report_items.insight_zh: 该决定为抗体专利撰写提供了重要参考，表明在结构性限定可能导致保护范围过窄时，可通过引入精确的功能性限制来维持创造性的可信度。申请人需关注EPO对“全范围可信度”的严格审查标准，并在说明书中充分支持功能特征与结构特征的关联，以优化权利要求布局。
report_items.insight_en: For practitioners managing European antibody portfolios, T 0655/24 highlights a viable drafting strategy when full structural definition yields excessively narrow claims. By anchoring claims in specific structural mutations paired with precise functional parameters, applicants can demonstrate cross-scope credibility. This approach mitigates the risk of post-filing evidence rejection while preserving commercially rele...
insight_points_zh: EPO对抗体权利要求全范围技术效果可信度的审查标准依然严格
结合具体结构突变与功能性参数限制是应对创造性质疑的有效策略
需持续监测EPO上诉委员会在后续类似案件中对功能特征接受度的变化
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Offers a pathway to broader antibody protection where full sequence claims are too restrictive for commercial needs.
Practice note: Draft claims combining specific structural mutations with quantifiable functional limits to satisfy EPO plausibility standards.
What to monitor: Future Board of Appeal decisions testing the acceptance of similar hybrid structural-functional claiming strategies.

While this concept is familiar to practitioners, the UPC is developing a distinct methodology that differs from the European Patent Office framework. This analysis summarizes the emerging judicial approach, highlighting key divergences from EPO practice. daily_report.summary_en: European intellectual property developments this week highlight significant judicial and administrative advancements. The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Milan Local Division issued landmark rulings in tire patent infringement cases, establishing that patent literature constitutes common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances. The court also clarified rules for shifting evidentiary burdens when information asymmetry exists between parties. Concurrently, the European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) published detailed guidance for the second phase of its design reform program, preparing stakeholders for regulations taking effect on July 1, 2026. In the United Kingdom, the UKIPO launched a Knowledge Asset Management Hub to support research institutions in commercializing intellectual property. Market consolidation continued as DeepIP acquired German AI tool PatentMaker, reflecting growing integration of artificial intelligence in patent prosecution. These movements collectively strengthen enforcement mechanisms and provide clearer operational frameworks for rights holders and practitioners navigating the evolving European IP landscape.
what_changed_vs_last_window_en: UPC Milan established specific precedents for evidentiary burdens and common general knowledge assessments in patent litigation.
EUIPO transitioned from legislative updates to practical implementation guidance for the impending design regulation reforms.
Market consolidation accelerated with DeepIP’s acquisition of PatentMaker, highlighting AI integration in German patent practices.

report_items.title_en: UKIPO Launches Knowledge Asset Management Hub for IP Guidance
report_items.title: Guidance: Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub
report_items.summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布“知识资产管理（KAM）枢纽”资源合集。该资源旨在协助研究机构和企业识别、保护、管理及利用其知识产权及更广泛的知识资产，提供相关指导与支持。
report_items.summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published the Knowledge Asset Management (KAM) Hub, a centralized resource collection designed to assist research institutions and businesses. This guidance aims to support organizations in identifying, protecting, managing, and utilizing their intellectual property alongside wider knowledge assets. The hub serves as a practical tool for rights holders seeking structured approaches to asset oversight. It provides foundational information for entities looking to enhance their internal capabilities regarding IP recognition and stewardship. The publication...
core_points_zh: UKIPO推出KAM枢纽，作为帮助机构管理知识资产的资源合集
资源目标涵盖知识产权的识别、保护、管理及使用全流程
core_points_en: UKIPO releases KAM Hub to help identify and protect intellectual property assets.
Resource targets research institutions and businesses managing wider knowledge assets.
report_items.insight_zh: 此为政策性指导资源发布，非法律变更或判例。实务中可关注该枢纽提供的具体工具与框架，以优化内部IP管理流程，但需结合具体业务场景评估适用性。
report_items.insight_en: This publication offers a non-binding administrative resource rather than new legal precedent. For in-house counsel and IP teams, the hub may serve as a reference for structuring internal audits of intangible assets. It highlights the UKIPO's focus on broader knowledge asset management beyond traditional IP rights. Practitioners should review the specific tools provided to determine if they align with existing corpor...
insight_points_zh: 关注KAM枢纽提供的具体管理工具与最佳实践框架
观察该指南对研究机构与企业IP合规管理的实际辅助作用
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Provides a centralized reference for organizations aiming to improve internal identification and protection of intellectual property and knowledge assets.
Practice note: Useful for benchmarking current asset management processes against UKIPO-endorsed frameworks for research institutions and commercial entities.
What to monitor: Updates to the KAM Hub content and any subsequent detailed guides or tools released by the UKIPO for practical implementation.

report_items.title_zh: 巴黎法院认定HYDRAFACIAL商标未退化并具显著性
report_items.title_en: Paris Court Rejects Degeneracy of HYDRAFACIAL Mark, Affirms Distinctiveness and Sanctions Unauthorized Use
report_items.title: Le Tribunal judiciaire de Paris écarte la dégénérescence de la marque HYDRAFACIAL, reconnait son caractère distinctif per se et sanctionne son exploitation non autorisée
report_items.summary_zh: 巴黎司法法院于2025年4月2日作出终审判决（案号RG n°21/13260），裁定HYDRAFACIAL商标未发生退化，确认其本身具有显著性，并制裁了未经授权的使用行为。该判决解决了商标持有人与另一方之间的争议，明确了该品牌在法国的法律保护状态。
report_items.summary_en: The Paris Judicial Court issued a final judgment on April 2, 2025 (RG n°21/13260), resolving a dispute concerning the validity and protection of the HYDRAFACIAL trademarks. The court rejected claims that the mark had become generic, affirming its inherent distinctiveness. Consequently, the tribunal sanctioned the unauthorized exploitation of the brand by the opposing party. This decision confirms the legal standing of the HYDRAFACIAL marks in France, upholding the rights holder’s ability to enforce against third-party use. The ruling underscores the court’s assessment that the mark retains its...
core_points_zh: 巴黎司法法院驳回HYDRAFACIAL商标退化的主张，维持其有效性
法院确认该商标本身具有显著性，受法律保护
法院对未经授权使用该商标的行为进行了制裁
core_points_en: Paris Judicial Court rejects degeneracy claim, confirming HYDRAFACIAL trademark remains valid and distinctive.
Court affirms inherent distinctiveness of the mark, recognizing its per se protective status under French law.
Unauthorized exploitation of the HYDRAFACIAL brand was sanctioned, reinforcing enforcement against infringing third parties.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment illustrates the French judiciary’s rigorous approach to trademark degeneracy, requiring substantial proof of genericide before stripping protection. For rights holders, it highlights the importance of consistent enforcement to maintain distinctiveness. Practitioners should note the court’s willingness to uphold well-known marks against dilution arguments when active policing is demonstrated. Monitoring...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Reinforces value of proactive enforcement to prevent trademark degeneracy claims in competitive markets.
Practice note: French courts maintain high evidentiary standards for proving a mark has become a common name.
What to monitor: Future applications of this precedent in other technical or medical device trademark disputes.

report_items.title_zh: 米兰地院裁定专利文献构成公知常识及举证责任转移
report_items.title_en: UPC Milan Local Division on Patent Literature as Common General Knowledge and Evidentiary Asymmetry
report_items.title: Milan Local Division on patent literature as common general knowledge and evidentiary asymmetry
report_items.summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰地方法院在倍耐力诉四川远星橡胶案中明确：仅在例外情况下，系列专利文献可构成本领域技术人员公知常识。若原告提供强有力侵权初步证据，而被告掌控关键技术信息，基于证据接近原则，举证责任可重新分配。法院援引EPO上诉委员会判例及欧盟法院Kelly案判决支持上述观点。
report_items.summary_en: The UPC Milan Local Division clarified when patent literature constitutes common general knowledge and how evidentiary burdens shift in infringement proceedings. In Pirelli v Sichuan Yuanxing, the Court aligned with EPO case law, ruling that patent documents only exceptionally qualify as common general knowledge, such as when a coherent series demonstrates a generally known technique. The Court also addressed evidentiary asymmetry, confirming that proof burdens may redistribute where claimants provide strong indicia of infringement and defendants control relevant technical information. This de...
core_points_zh: 法院确认仅例外情况下专利文献可视为公知常识，如系列文件呈现连贯技术图景
若原告提供强有力侵权迹象且被告掌控关键信息，举证责任可重新分配
法院援引EPO判例及欧盟法院Kelly案，强调信息不对称下的证据效力保护
core_points_en: Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical series.
Evidentiary burdens may shift when claimants show strong infringement indicia and defendants control key information.
The principle of proximity of evidence supports redistributing proof obligations in cases of informational asymmetry.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This judgment provides critical guidance for UPC litigation strategy regarding proof standards. It reinforces the high threshold for treating patent citations as common general knowledge while offering a procedural mechanism for rights holders facing evidentiary barriers. Practitioners should note the Court’s willingness to adjust burden-sharing based on evidence proximity, balancing initial proof requirements agains...
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical information.
Practice note: Establishing patent literature as common general knowledge requires demonstrating a coherent series of documents, not isolated citations.
What to monitor: Future UPC decisions defining the threshold for strong indicia of infringement triggering evidentiary redistribution.

The newly released guidance aims to provide clarity for registered design applicants and legal practitioners ahead of the imminent regulatory updates. This announcement serves as a preparatory resource for stakeholders managing EU design portfolios, offering early insight into procedural adjustments. By issuing this information well in advance of the effective date, the EU...

While specific procedural mechanics may evolve, current materials allow for preliminary assessment of portfolio management impacts. Stakeholders should integrate these timelines i...

report_items.title_zh: 通过塞浦路斯知识产权盒制度最大化软件与创新价值
report_items.title_en: Cyprus IP Box Regime: Tax Efficiency for Software and Innovation Assets
report_items.title: Maximising Software And Innovation Value Through The Cyprus IP Box Regime
report_items.summary_zh: 文章分析塞浦路斯符合经合组织标准的知识产权盒制度。该制度允许对合格知识产权收入享受80%扣除，有效税率约3%。采用“修正关联法”，要求税收优惠与实际研发支出挂钩。受版权保护的软件明确纳入合格资产，但商标等品牌资产 excluded。合格收入涵盖许可费、嵌入产品的收入及处置收益。
report_items.summary_en: Cyprus offers an OECD-compliant Intellectual Property Box regime designed to incentivize research and development. The framework provides an eighty percent deduction on qualifying IP profits, resulting in an effective corporate tax rate of approximately three percent. This benefit applies to income derived from copyrighted software, algorithms, and platforms, provided the taxpayer demonstrates a direct link between the income and actual R&D expenditures. The regime utilizes a modified nexus approach to ensure compliance with international standards, requiring that tax relief remains proportion...
core_points_zh: 塞浦路斯知识产权盒提供80%利润扣除，结合15%企业税率，使合格IP收入有效税率降至约…
制度核心为修正关联法，确保税收减免比例与企业实际发生的合格研发支出相匹配，符合经合组织…
受版权保护的软件、算法及平台属于合格知识产权，但商标和徽标等品牌相关资产不符合该制度资格
core_points_en: Qualifying IP income benefits from an eighty percent deduction, yielding an effective tax rate near three percent.
The modified nexus approach links tax relief directly to substantiated research and development expenditures incurred by the entity.
Copyrighted software and digital assets qualify for the regime, whereas brand-related assets such as trademarks are excluded.
report_items.insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，塞浦路斯后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
report_items.insight_en: This regime is relevant for technology companies structuring IP ownership within the EU. It emphasizes substance over form, requiring robust documentation of R&D spend to justify tax benefits. Rights holders should assess whether their software development activities meet the modified nexus criteria to optimize fiscal efficiency while maintaining OECD compliance.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Tech firms holding copyrighted software can significantly reduce tax liability on IP-derived income through structured R&D investment.
Practice note: Accurate allocation and documentation of qualifying R&D expenditures are essential to satisfy the modified nexus approach requirements.
What to monitor: Watch for evolving administrative guidance on eligible R&D costs and potential updates to OECD nexus standards affecting eligibility.

report_items.title_zh: EPO决定T 0655/24：平衡抗体权利要求的结构与功能特征
report_items.title_en: EPO Decision T 0655/24: Balancing Structure and Function in Antibody Claims
report_items.title: EPO decision T 0655/24: Striking the Right Balance in Antibody Claim Drafting
report_items.summary_zh: 本文分析EPO决定T 0655/24，探讨如何在抗体权利要求中平衡结构与功能特征以确立创造性。针对仅由部分结构特征定义的权利要求易受质疑的问题，该决定展示了一种替代方案：结合有限的结构定义（如特定Fc突变）与反映技术效果的功能限制，既确保技术效果在权利要求范围内可信，又避免保护范围过窄。
report_items.summary_en: This analysis of EPO decision T 0655/24 addresses the challenge of drafting antibody claims that satisfy inventive step requirements without becoming unduly narrow. The European Patent Office requires technical effects to be credible across the entire claim scope. While defining antibodies by full variable domain sequences ensures credibility, it often restricts protection. T 0655/24 illustrates an alternative approach combining limited structural definitions, such as specific Fc mutations, with functional limitations. This method maintains claim breadth while ensuring the asserted technical e...
core_points_zh: EPO实践中，若技术效果无法在权利要求全范围内被证实可信，则不能支持创造性
T 0655/24展示了结合特定Fc突变结构定义与功能性限制的权利要求撰写方法
该方法要求Fc区不结合Fcγ受体，且血浆清除率偏差控制在特定比例内
core_points_en: Technical effects must be credible across the full claim scope to support inventive step at the EPO.
T 0655/24 combines specific Fc mutation structures with functional limits to balance breadth and credibility.
Functional parameters included non-binding of Fc gamma receptors and controlled plasma clearance rate deviations.
report_items.insight_zh: 该决定为抗体专利撰写提供了重要参考，表明在结构性限定可能导致保护范围过窄时，可通过引入精确的功能性限制来维持创造性的可信度。申请人需关注EPO对“全范围可信度”的严格审查标准，并在说明书中充分支持功能特征与结构特征的关联，以优化权利要求布局。
report_items.insight_en: For practitioners managing European antibody portfolios, T 0655/24 highlights a viable drafting strategy when full structural definition yields excessively narrow claims. By anchoring claims in specific structural mutations paired with precise functional parameters, applicants can demonstrate cross-scope credibility. This approach mitigates the risk of post-filing evidence rejection while preserving commercially rele...
insight_points_zh: EPO对抗体权利要求全范围技术效果可信度的审查标准依然严格
结合具体结构突变与功能性参数限制是应对创造性质疑的有效策略
需持续监测EPO上诉委员会在后续类似案件中对功能特征接受度的变化
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Offers a pathway to broader antibody protection where full sequence claims are too restrictive for commercial needs.
Practice note: Draft claims combining specific structural mutations with quantifiable functional limits to satisfy EPO plausibility standards.
What to monitor: Future Board of Appeal decisions testing the acceptance of similar hybrid structural-functional claiming strategies.

Drawing on a webinar with Barker Brettell practitioners, the resource highlights the shift from academic legal analysis to commercial advisory roles. Practitioners should avoid presenting options without recommendations, instead offering clear steers based on legal and commercial assessments.
Effective client relationships rely on consistency, clarity, and honesty, alongside attention to professional wellbeing and networking.

report_items.title_en: PMAC Opens Alongside UPC: ADR Options for European Patent Disputes
report_items.title: PMAC Operating Alongside The UPC – Will The Combination Of Conventional Patent Litigation And Alternative Dispute Resolution (ADR) Form The New Gold Standard?
report_items.summary_zh: Mondaq 转载 Bardehle Pagenberg 文章称，统一专利法院框架下的专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）已于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放，地点设在卢布尔雅那和里斯本。文章介绍，PMAC 面向欧洲专利、单一效力专利、补充保护证书及相关争议提供调解和仲裁程序，并已通过仲裁规则和调解规则。文章认为，PMAC 可能在 FRAND 争议等场景中成为传统 UPC 诉讼之外的补充选择。
report_items.summary_en: The Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) formally opened on June 2, 2026, integrating into the Unified Patent Court framework. Based in Ljubljana and Lisbon, PMAC offers mediation and arbitration for patent disputes under the UPCA. It adopted specific Arbitration and Mediation Rules in April 2026 and publishes a roster of qualified neutrals. The centre aims to provide efficient, confidential alternatives to litigation, particularly for FRAND disputes. Its jurisdiction covers unitary patents, SPCs, and related commercial disputes with a factual or legal nexus to UPC-competent matters...
core_points_zh: PMAC 于 2026 年 6 月 2 日正式开放。
其规则基础来自 UPCA、UPC 程序规则以及 PMAC 的仲裁和调解规则。
PMAC 可覆盖欧洲专利、单一效力专利、SPC 及具有联系的相关争议。
core_points_en: PMAC formally launched on June 2, 2026, offering mediation and arbitration within the UPC framework.
Jurisdiction includes unitary patents, SPCs, and related disputes with a factual or legal nexus.
New Arbitration and Mediation Rules were adopted in April 2026, alongside a published neutral roster.
report_items.insight_zh: PMAC 的启动使 UPC 体系从单纯法院诉讼扩展到更完整的争议解决组合。对 SEP/FRAND、跨境许可和商业关系仍需维持的专利争议而言，调解或仲裁可能提供更灵活、保密和可控的路径，但企业仍需评估可执行性、保全措施和与 UPC 未决诉讼的衔接。
report_items.insight_en: PMAC introduces a structured ADR pathway for rights holders seeking confidentiality and flexibility outside traditional litigation. This is particularly relevant for FRAND and licensing disputes where preserving commercial relationships is prioritized. Practitioners should evaluate PMAC’s procedural rules against ongoing UPC actions. Monitoring early case uptake will clarify how PMAC interacts with parallel court pro...
insight_points_zh: UPC 体系开始形成诉讼与 ADR 并行的制度结构。
FRAND 和许可争议可能是 PMAC 最值得关注的应用场景。
合同争议解决条款应考虑是否纳入 PMAC 路径。
insight_points_en: Client relevance: PMAC offers a confidential, flexible alternative to litigation for FRAND and licensing disputes.
Practice note: Review contract dispute clauses to consider incorporating PMAC mediation or arbitration mechanisms.
What to monitor: Early adoption rates and judicial treatment of PMAC outcomes in parallel UPC proceedings.

daily_audio_latest.headline_zh: UPC强化侵权裁决，EUIPO发布设计改革指南
daily_audio_latest.headline_en: UPC Milan Sets Evidence Standards as EUIPO Issues Design Reform Guidance
daily_audio_latest.summary_zh: 本周欧洲IP领域呈现司法与行政双轨并进态势。统一专利法院（UPC）米兰分院在两起轮胎专利案中裁定侵权成立，并明确专利文献作为公知常识的例外情形及举证责任转移规则，强化了权利人保护。EUIPO发布欧盟外观设计改革第二阶段实施指南，为7月生效的新规提供操作指引。英国知识产权局推出知识资产管理枢纽，旨在提升研究机构IP商业化能力。此外，DeepIP收购德国PatentMaker，显示AI工具在欧洲专利市场的整合加速。
daily_audio_latest.summary_en: European intellectual property developments this week highlight significant judicial and administrative advancements. The Unified Patent Court (UPC) Milan Local Division issued landmark rulings in tire patent infringement cases, establishing that patent literature constitutes common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances. The court also clarified rules for shifting evidentiary burdens when information asymmetry exists between parties. Concurrently, the European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) published detailed guidance for the second phase of its design reform program, preparing stakeholders for regulations taking effect on July 1, 2026. In the United Kingdom, the UKIPO launched a Knowledge Asset Management Hub to support research institutions in commercializing intellectual property. Market consolidation continued as DeepIP acquired German AI tool PatentMaker, reflecting growing integration of artificial intelligence in patent prosecution. These movements collectively strengthen enforcement mechanisms and provide clearer operational frameworks for rights holders and practitioners navigating the evolving European IP landscape.

Next, UKIPO introduces the Knowledge Asset Management Hub to support the UK research sector. Why it matters: Research-intensive organizations and universities in the UK should evaluate if this hub offers relevant tools for their internal IP gov.
Next, Paris Judicial Court rejects degeneracy claim, confirming HYDRAFACIAL trademark remains valid and distinctive. Why it matters: Reinforces value of proactive enforcement to prevent trademark degeneracy claims in competitive markets.
Finally, Patent literature qualifies as common general knowledge only in exceptional circumstances involving coherent technical s. Why it matters: Rights holders can leverage strong preliminary evidence to shift evidentiary burdens when defendants possess exclusive technical inform.
Overall, today's European IP signals center on General IP, Trade marks, Patents. The next point to watch is Evolution of UPC Court of Appeal methodologies for assessing inventive step.

topics.headline_zh: UPC机制成熟与中国申请激增
topics.headline_en: UPC Maturity, PMAC Launch, and Rising Global Patent Filings
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，统一专利法院（UPC）运行趋于成熟，PMAC调解中心正式启用，杜塞尔多夫等核心分院扩容。EPO数据显示中国首次跻身欧洲专利申请来源国前三，统一专利采纳率显著提升。司法实践在证据披露、权利要求解释及费用裁定上确立严格标准，中欧企业需适应“诉讼+ADR”双轨制及高合规要求。
key_points: UPC生态完善：PMAC调解仲裁中心上线，杜塞尔多夫增设合议庭，案件管理系统优化，形成诉讼与ADR并行机制。
中国地位跃升：2025年中国首次进入EPO申请来源国前三，统一专利在中小企业中采纳率达28.7%，市场参与度深化。
司法标准趋严：米兰及赫尔辛基分院判例强调审查档案对权利要求的限制作用，严格执行证据前置披露，迟交证据易被排除。
actions: 利用PMAC机制：针对SEP/FRAND或许可纠纷，优先评估通过PMAC进行调解或仲裁，以降低维权成本并缩短周期。
强化证据合规：建立严格的欧洲专利诉讼证据管理流程，确保所有实物证据及来源证明在法定期限内完整披露，避免失权。
优化权利要求布局：在申请阶段保持授权陈述与诉讼策略一致，审慎使用功能性限定，防范因审查档案禁反言导致保护范围缩窄。
watchlist: UPC上诉法院关于管辖权范围提请欧盟法院裁决的后续结果及其对单一专利效力的影响。
EPO 2027年指南修订中关于修改依据强制指明的具体规定，及其与UPC判例法的衔接情况。
主要分院（如慕尼黑、巴黎）在等同侵权判定上的裁判口径差异，以预判跨法域诉讼风险。
topics.summary_en: In the first half of 2026, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) ecosystem matured with the operational launch of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre (PMAC) and expanded judicial capacity in key divisions like Düsseldorf. EPO data confirms China has entered the top three countries of origin for European patent applications, while Unitary Patent adoption reached 28.7%, driven significantly by SMEs. Judicial practice is solidifying strict standards regarding evidence disclosure, claim interpretation, and cost allocation, as seen in recent rulings from Milan and Helsinki. Rights holders must now navigate a dual-track environment combining litigation with alternative dispute resolution. Companies are advised to align prosecution strategies with litigation risks, particularly concerning file wrapper estoppel, and to leverage new ADR mechanisms for efficient dispute management.
key_points_en: The UPC infrastructure is fully operational with the PMAC mediation center live and additional judicial panels established in Düsseldorf to handle increasing caseloads.
China has become a top-three source of EPO filings, and Unitary Patent uptake has reached 28.7%, indicating deepened market participation among SMEs and global entities.
Courts in Milan and Helsinki are enforcing rigorous evidentiary standards, emphasizing the limiting effect of prosecution history on claim scope and strict deadlines for evidence s...
actions_en: Evaluate PMAC mediation or arbitration for SEP/FRAND and licensing disputes to reduce enforcement costs and accelerate resolution timelines.
Implement strict evidence management protocols to ensure all physical evidence and source documentation are disclosed within statutory deadlines to avoid preclusion.
Align claim drafting with litigation strategy by avoiding inconsistent statements during prosecution to mitigate file wrapper estoppel risks and preserve protection scope.
watchlist_en: Outcomes of UPC Court of Appeal referrals to the CJEU regarding jurisdictional scope and their impact on Unitary Patent validity.
Specific mandates in the 2027 EPO Guidelines regarding amendment bases and their alignment with emerging UPC case law.
Divergences in equivalence infringement rulings across major divisions such as Munich and Paris to assess cross-border litigation risks.

topics.headline_zh: 欧洲SEP司法博弈加剧与ADR新路径
topics.headline_en: European SEP Litigation Intensifies as ADR Mechanisms and Jurisdictional Conflicts Rise
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧洲SEP领域呈现司法管辖权争夺与替代性争议解决机制（ADR）兴起并存的态势。UPC曼海姆分院打破传统尝试裁定FRAND费率，同时PMAC正式运营提供调解新选项。中英法院在ZTE诉三星案中作出冲突判决，凸显全球费率设定风险。禁诉令频发及TTBER新规生效，要求中企重构许可谈判策略以应对碎片化监管与诉讼压力。
key_points: UPC司法活跃：曼海姆分院倾向裁定FRAND费率，PMAC中心开放提供诉讼外调解路径，形成‘诉讼+ADR’双轨制。
管辖权冲突：中英法院就ZTE诉三星案作出相互冲突的全球费率判决，诺基亚等权利人频繁利用禁诉令阻断中国程序。
合规框架更新：修订版TTBER生效强化专利池反垄断指导，英国推进SEP改革，司法与行政监管双重收紧。
actions: 建立前置响应机制：收到侵权通知须立即书面表达许可意愿，避免因被认定‘非善意’而面临禁令风险。
优化合同条款：审查现有许可协议，明确UPC管辖退出权归属及争议解决地，规避集中无效与长臂管辖风险。
多元化应对策略：评估利用UPC专利调解与仲裁中心（PMAC）进行和解的可能性，降低跨国诉讼成本与不确定性。
watchlist: 英国最高法院对专利池FRAND义务及全球费率设定的最终裁决动向。
UPC上诉法院关于禁诉令（ASI/AASI）及跨境管辖权界限的后续判例。
欧盟委员会针对汽车及流媒体行业SEP许可谈判组的反垄断执法口径变化。

topics.china_impact_summary_zh: 这条长窗显示，SEP 风险已经从传统通信终端延伸到车载与 IoT，并在德国、英国和 UPC 三条诉讼线同步抬升。对中国企业来说，下一阶段重点不只是单案应对，而是把许可准备、诉讼预案和规则跟踪并行推进。
china_action_points: 涉及车载、蜂窝、Wi-Fi 或 IoT 出海业务的中国企业，应尽快核查专利池与双边许可覆盖，避免产品上市后再被动补谈。
在德国、英国和 UPC 有销售、供应链或客户落点的企业，应同步准备 FRAND 谈判材料、可比许可证据与禁令应对预案。
法务、标准与商务团队需要持续跟踪英欧 SEP 政策和竞争法变化，避免沿用单一市场的许可策略应对欧洲。
针对已进入欧洲市场的中国终端、部件与整车企业，建议把 SEP 许可预算、争议升级路径和管辖博弈纳入年度经营安排。

topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the European standard-essential patent landscape was defined by heightened judicial activity and the emergence of alternative dispute resolution. The Unified Patent Court’s Mannheim Local Division actively asserted jurisdiction to set FRAND rates and issued anti-anti-suit injunctions, while the newly operational Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre provided a structured mediation pathway. Concurrently, conflicting global rate determinations in the ZTE v Samsung litigation between Chinese and European courts highlighted significant cross-border enforcement risks. The implementation of revised Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulations and ongoing United Kingdom regulatory reforms further complicated compliance obligations. These developments necessitate that rights holders and implementers recalibrate licensing strategies to address fragmented regula...
key_points_en: The Unified Patent Court is actively shaping FRAND jurisprudence through rate-setting precedents and anti-anti-suit injunctions, while the new Patent Mediation and Arbitration Cent...
Conflicting global rate judgments in major multinational litigation and frequent use of cross-border injunctions underscore the risks of forum shopping and the need for coordinated...
Updated antitrust guidelines under the revised Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation and emerging United Kingdom regulatory frameworks are tightening compliance requiremen...
actions_en: Establish immediate response protocols to infringement notices by formally expressing willingness to license, thereby preserving FRAND defenses and mitigating the risk of injunctiv...
Review and update existing license agreements to explicitly allocate authority for Unified Patent Court opt-out decisions and define preferred jurisdictions for dispute resolution.
Evaluate the strategic use of the Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre for early settlement opportunities to reduce the costs and uncertainties associated with multi-jurisdictio...
watchlist_en: Final rulings from the United Kingdom Supreme Court regarding FRAND obligations and the enforceability of global royalty rate determinations.
Precedents from the Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal concerning the scope of anti-suit injunctions and the limits of cross-border jurisdiction.
Enforcement trends and policy guidance from the European Commission regarding antitrust compliance in automotive and streaming media SEP licensing negotiations.

topics.headline_zh: 欧盟外观改革在即与执法趋严
topics.headline_en: EUIPO Design Reform Takes Effect Amid Stricter Enforcement and Brexit Rulings
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，EUIPO发布外观设计改革第二阶段指南，7月1日生效。司法层面明确脱欧后英国权利失效及名人姓名商标限制。执法上，EUIPO联合多机构打击网络假冒与药品侵权，并推广数字化工具。中小企业可关注基金补贴与IP融资新机遇，需警惕合规风险。
key_points: 外观设计改革：EUIPO发布第二阶段实施指南，定于2026年7月1日正式生效，DesignView成为全球最大图像搜索引擎。
司法裁判风向：法院裁定脱欧过渡期后纯英国法在先权利无效；拒绝“George Orwell”等名人姓名商标注册，强化声誉评估。
执法与融资：EUIPO联合欧盟委员会、Eurojust严打网络假冒及有组织犯罪；携手EIF解锁IP支持型融资，推广IPEP数字执法工具。
actions: 应对外观新规：立即审查对欧出口产品的外观设计，利用DesignView进行全球检索，确保符合7月生效的新规要求。
排查商标风险：清理依赖英国未注册权利的欧盟商标布局；避免抢注名人姓名，重新评估在先权利的有效性与时点。
利用政策红利：申请EUIPO中小企业基金以降低注册成本；探索知识产权质押融资渠道，建立合规溯源体系以应对严查。
watchlist: 7月1日外观设计改革第二阶段正式生效后的具体审查实践与配套细则。
欧盟手工艺品和工业产品地理标志（CIGI）国家制度向欧盟制度过渡的最终截止动态。
EUIPO与EIF合作的IP融资机制落地情况及对中国企业的具体准入条件。
topics.summary_en: The EUIPO has issued final guidance for Phase Two of the EU design reform, effective 1 July 2026, while expanding DesignView into the world’s largest image search engine. Judicial developments clarify that UK-only rights cannot support EU trademark oppositions decided post-Brexit transition, and courts are enforcing stricter reputation assessments for celebrity name marks. Enforcement efforts have intensified through joint operations with Europol and the European Commission targeting online counterfeiting and pharmaceutical fraud, supported by digital tools like the IP Enforcement Portal. Simultaneously, the EUIPO and European Investment Fund are launching initiatives to facilitate IP-backed financing for SMEs. Rights holders must adapt to these regulatory shifts, validate earlier right statuses, and leverage new funding and enforcement mechanisms to protect brand integrity and maximize...
key_points_en: Phase Two of the EU design reform enters into force on 1 July 2026, accompanied by enhanced global prior art search capabilities via DesignView.
Courts rule that UK-only rights cannot block EU trademark applications post-transition and mandate comprehensive evidence for reputation-based invalidity actions.
EUIPO collaborates with EU agencies to combat online counterfeiting and promotes IP-backed financing opportunities for small and medium-sized enterprises.
actions_en: Audit design portfolios against the new Phase Two regulations using DesignView for global clearance before the 1 July 2026 effective date.
Reevaluate EU trademark opposition strategies relying on UK unregistered rights and ensure robust evidence collection for reputation-based enforcement actions.
Explore EUIPO SME funds and IP-backed financing options while integrating digital enforcement tools to strengthen anti-counterfeiting supply chain controls.
watchlist_en: Practical examination standards and procedural nuances following the 1 July 2026 implementation of the design reform Phase Two.
Final transitional deadlines and national-to-EU conversion procedures for Craft and Industrial Geographical Indications (CIGI) protection systems.
Operational details and eligibility criteria for the new IP-backed financing mechanisms developed jointly by the EUIPO and European Investment Fund.

topics.headline_zh: 欧英强化IP犯罪协同执法
topics.headline_en: EU and UK Intensify Cross-Border Enforcement Against Intellectual Property Crime
topics.summary_zh: 2026年上半年，欧盟与英国显著升级假冒打击力度。EUIPO联合欧委会及Eurojust深化跨机构协作，聚焦药品与网络侵权；英国延长IP犯罪部门资金至2029年并拟扩编，同时关注二手平台假货治理。执法呈现刑事化、跨境协同及全渠道覆盖趋势，中企需警惕合规风险。
key_points: 欧盟层面：EUIPO联合欧委会、Eurojust推进EMPACT框架，重点打击有组织IP犯罪、假冒药品及在线盗版，强化跨境司法协作。
英国动态：UKIPO确认IP犯罪专项执法资金延至2029年并计划扩编，发布二手时尚反假指南，执法资源持续倾斜。
监管趋势：执法从单一商标维权转向“刑事打击+公众沟通+平台治理”综合模式，特别关注高风险品类（如药品、耗材）及二手交易场景。
actions: 建立供应链溯源合规体系，确保出口产品（尤其医药、电子耗材）来源清晰，防范被卷入有组织犯罪指控。
将Vinted等二手交易平台纳入品牌监测范围，针对英国市场制定专门的转售渠道防伪与投诉策略。
加强与海关及当地律所的线索联动，利用EUIPO与各国警方的协作机制，主动提供侵权证据以推动刑事立案。
watchlist: 欧盟后续针对网络假冒和药品执法的具体配套法规或操作指引。
英国IP犯罪部门扩编后的具体职能变化及2029年前的案件查处数据。
EMPACT框架下知识产权犯罪执法的年度优先事项调整及跨机构协作案例。

topics.summary_en: During the first half of 2026, the European Union and the United Kingdom significantly escalated efforts to combat intellectual property crime. The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) deepened collaboration with the European Commission and Eurojust under the EMPACT framework, targeting organized crime networks, counterfeit medicines, and online piracy. Concurrently, the UK Intellectual Property Office secured funding for its specialist IP Crime Unit through 2029 and indicated plans for expansion, while issuing new guidance on counterfeit goods in secondary markets. Enforcement strategies are shifting toward a comprehensive model combining criminal prosecution, public awareness, and platform governance.
